contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Credentialing platform v1 shipped end-to-end
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/86
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/89
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/92
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/93
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/5
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/6
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/7
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/pull/9
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/pull/11
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/293
  
  Details:
  Credentialing platform reached an end-to-end state on beta.truesight.me this session:
  
  - /members.html lists all 377 DAO contributors, governors sorted to the top with their voting power; each card shows TDG controlled + contribution count.
  - /credentials/#<slug> renders for every contributor: header pills (Governor / DAO / Practitioner), Grok-generated third-person narrative, rubric breakdown, recent 20 contributions with clickable URLs in descriptions, prev/next neighbor nav, linked program header to the practice surface (e.g. capoeira.agroverse.shop), Download-PDF and View-Source-JSON buttons.
  - First end-to-end practitioner-x-DAO merge: Gary Teh's capoeira pk-wR9zU8JMnEz1 now joins the gary-teh DAO record under one canonical slug.
  - Telegram Chat Logs column mapping fixed in the credentialing GAS so PRACTICE rows actually process (root cause of earlier silent no-op).
  - Builder hardening: NaN-safe + comma-aware numeric coercion (unblocked Gary's profile from JSON parse failure); idempotency on narrative regeneration (CI without GROK_API_KEY no longer wipes narratives); render_markdown now includes the narrative + role pills so downloaded PDFs match the web page.
  - New Field Signals blog post "What the angels couldn't name" (Ocean Beach walk with Bilal -> Edmodo arc -> Emelin / Suheil / Stanley Li / Liz / Labinot / Ken / Bilal convergence -> credentialing platform). Linked to /credentials/#<slug> profiles for each named contributor.
  - Documented the local-only Grok sweep flow in agentic_ai_context CREDENTIALING_PLATFORM.md so future LLM sessions can find the run command and rationale.
  
  Visible outcomes: /credentials/#gary-teh shows governor pill + Grok narrative + capoeira sessions merged with DAO contributions on one CV page; /members.html lists all 10 current governors sorted by voting power above the regulars.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 300.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
